messages.content: The labels should also have the same effect. Increase the opacity of unhighlighted nodes and links to be higher and reduce the default opacity of all links to be 0.8. Also add a blue border to the highlighted nodes when hovered over and set the connected link opacity to 1.0.
the opacity and blue border effects should stay for frozen nodes and those connected to it.
this is not right, the styles should only stay when a node becomes frozen, but not when a user mouseouted an unfrozen node
still not quite right. Only add blue border to the frozen node itself, not the connected nodes. And the graph should return to it’s original style if no nodes are frozen
the blue border should also be given to the hovered node. When a node is frozen, only the frozen node has blue border, but the connected nodes should have opacity 1.0 as well.
